    analyze(DoctorAnalysisRequest) - Method in class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAnalyzer
    Collects evidence, diagnoses it, and writes portable JSON and Markdown reports.
    analyze(EvidenceBundle, Diagnosis, DoctorAiAnalysisRequest, Path) - Method in class com.shaft.doctor.ai.DoctorAiAnalysisService
    Produces an optional advisory without changing deterministic diagnosis fields.
    analyzeWithAi(DoctorAnalysisRequest, DoctorAiAnalysisRequest) - Method in class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAnalyzer
    Runs deterministic analysis first, then optionally appends a separate provider advisory.

    DATA - Enum constant in enum class com.shaft.doctor.model.CauseCategory
     
    DEFAULT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairRequest
    Conservative default validation timeout.
    DEFAULT_MAX_BUNDLE_BYTES - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAnalysisRequest
    Default maximum retained size for an evidence bundle.
    DEFAULT_MAX_EVIDENCE_BYTES - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAiAnalysisRequest
    Default maximum submitted evidence size.
    DEFAULT_MAX_EVIDENCE_ITEMS - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAiAnalysisRequest
    Default maximum number of minimized evidence items.
    DEFAULT_MAX_ITEM_BYTES - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAnalysisRequest
    Default maximum retained size for one evidence item.
    DEFAULT_MAX_PATCH_BYTES - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairRequest
    Conservative default aggregate patch limit.
    DEFAULT_MAX_RESPONSE_BYTES - Static variable in record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAiAnalysisRequest
    Default maximum structured provider response size.

    Creates a disabled request that preserves deterministic output.

    Returns a disabled advisory that is not rendered into deterministic reports.
    DISABLED - Enum constant in enum class com.shaft.doctor.model.DoctorAdvisory.Status
     
    DoctorAdvisory - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Separately identified optional provider advisory that never replaces the deterministic diagnosis.
    DoctorAdvisory(String, DoctorAdvisory.Status, DoctorAdvisory.ProviderAnalysis, DoctorAdvisory.Metadata) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.model.DoctorAdvisory
    Creates a validated advisory.
    DoctorAdvisory.Hypothesis - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    One provider hypothesis.
    DoctorAdvisory.Metadata - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Safe provider, timing, usage, cache, and fallback metadata.
    DoctorAdvisory.Observation - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    One provider observation.
    DoctorAdvisory.ProviderAnalysis - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Versioned provider output accepted by Doctor.
    DoctorAdvisory.RecommendedAction - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    One provider-recommended action.
    DoctorAdvisory.Status - Enum Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Advisory outcome.
    DoctorAiAnalysisRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor
    Explicit policy for one optional provider-assisted Doctor analysis.
    DoctorAiAnalysisRequest(boolean, ApprovalPolicy, Duration, AiBudget, int, long, long, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAiAnalysisRequest
    Creates a validated provider-analysis policy.
    DoctorAiAnalysisResult - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Deterministic Doctor result plus a separately identified optional advisory.
    DoctorAiAnalysisResult(DoctorAnalysisResult, DoctorAdvisory) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.model.DoctorAiAnalysisResult
    Creates a complete result.
    DoctorAiAnalysisService - Class in com.shaft.doctor.ai
    Builds minimized Doctor provider requests and validates separately rendered advisories.
    DoctorAiAnalysisService() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.ai.DoctorAiAnalysisService
    Creates a service using current SHAFT properties and the shared provider registry.
    DoctorAiAnalysisService(Function, Supplier) - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.ai.DoctorAiAnalysisService
    Creates a service with injectable execution and configuration boundaries.
    DoctorAnalysisRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor
    Explicit local input and privacy policy for one deterministic analysis.

    Creates a validated analysis request.
    DoctorAnalysisResult - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Analyzer outputs and diagnosis.
    DoctorAnalysisResult(EvidenceBundle, Diagnosis, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.model.DoctorAnalysisResult
    Creates a complete analysis result.
    DoctorAnalysisSummary - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.model
    Safe analysis summary for CLI or MCP responses without retained evidence content.
    DoctorAnalysisSummary(String, int, int, Diagnosis, String, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.model.DoctorAnalysisSummary
    Creates a validated summary.
    DoctorAnalyzer - Class in com.shaft.doctor
    Offline deterministic SHAFT evidence analyzer.
    DoctorAnalyzer() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.DoctorAnalyzer
    Creates the default analyzer.
    DoctorCli - Class in com.shaft.doctor.cli
    Executable local CLI for SHAFT Doctor.
    DoctorFormatException - Exception Class in com.shaft.doctor.format
    Safe evidence or report format failure.
    DoctorFormatException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.shaft.doctor.format.DoctorFormatException
    Creates a format failure.
    DoctorFormatException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class com.shaft.doctor.format.DoctorFormatException
    Creates a format failure with its cause.
    DoctorHashing - Class in com.shaft.doctor.internal
    SHA-256 helpers for stable identifiers and integrity metadata.
    DoctorJsonCodec - Class in com.shaft.doctor.format
    Deterministic JSON codec for Doctor evidence, diagnosis, and reports.
    DoctorJsonCodec() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.format.DoctorJsonCodec
    Creates the stable codec.

    Structured and textual deterministic redaction for Doctor evidence.

    DoctorRepairAiRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Explicit policy for optional provider-generated structured repair patches.

    Creates a validated provider patch policy.
    DoctorRepairAiService - Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Generates optional schema-constrained file patches through the shared AI boundary.
    DoctorRepairAiService() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairAiService
    Creates a service using the configured shared provider registry.
    DoctorRepairPatchResult - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Optional provider patch result that never changes repository state.
    DoctorRepairPatchResult(AiResponseStatus, String, String, List, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairPatchResult
    Creates an immutable provider patch result.
    DoctorRepairProposalResult - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    MCP-friendly result for deterministic or optional provider-assisted repair proposals.
    DoctorRepairProposalResult(RepairProposal, DoctorRepairPatchResult) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairProposalResult
    Creates an instance of a DoctorRepairProposalResult record class.
    DoctorRepairPublicationRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Separate explicit approval for publishing a reviewed Doctor proposal.
    DoctorRepairPublicationRequest(Path, boolean, String, boolean, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairPublicationRequest
    Creates a validated publication request.
    DoctorRepairRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Explicit policy for creating an isolated Doctor repair proposal.
    DoctorRepairRequest(Path, String, Path, Path, String, List, List, List, boolean, Path, long, Duration) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairRequest
    Creates a validated immutable request.
    DoctorRepairRequest.FilePatch - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Structured file replacement applied only inside the isolated worktree.
    DoctorRepairRequest.FilePatch.Operation - Enum Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Supported file operations.
    DoctorRepairRequest.ValidationCommand - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Tokenized Maven command; no shell parsing or interpolation is performed.
    DoctorRepairService - Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Creates reviewed repairs in isolated Git worktrees and publishes only explicitly approved draft pull requests.
    DoctorRepairService() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.repair.DoctorRepairService
    Creates the default repair service.

    Writes deterministic human-readable Doctor reports.

    Returns the value of the healingAttemptId record component.
    HealingLocatorProposal - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Proposal-only bridge from a verified SHAFT Heal report to the isolated SHAFT Doctor repair workflow.
    HealingLocatorProposal(String, String, String, String, int, String, String, double, List, String, String, DoctorRepairRequest.FilePatch, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.HealingLocatorProposal
    Creates an immutable proposal.
    HealingLocatorProposalRequest - Record Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Explicit request to derive a reviewed locator patch proposal from a verified SHAFT Heal report.
    HealingLocatorProposalRequest(Path, Path, String, boolean, Path) - Constructor for record class com.shaft.doctor.repair.HealingLocatorProposalRequest
    Creates a validated request.
    HealingLocatorProposalService - Class in com.shaft.doctor.repair
    Creates reviewable locator patch proposals from verified SHAFT Heal reports.
    HealingLocatorProposalService() - Constructor for class com.shaft.doctor.repair.HealingLocatorProposalService
